Pesky.PsychicRitualDef_RemoveCurses.label: unbinding ritual
Pesky.PsychicRitualDef_RemoveCurses.description: A psychic ritual designed to sever the ethereal ties of cursed manifestations. By channeling focused psychic energy through a target, the ritual can dissolve unnatural brands and mental strains left by ghastly weapons.
Pesky.PsychicRitualDef_RemoveCurses.outcomeDescription: The ritual channels focused psychic energy to dissolve unnatural brands and mental strains. The spirit-cleansing weave will attempt to purge all ghastly curses from the target, though the process requires intense concentration and an archotech shard to anchor the soul.
